exampleSentences: Sáng nay anh mua một bó hoa tươi để tặng mẹ.
Em thích trồng hoa trong vườn vào cuối tuần.
Chị nhận được rất nhiều hoa vào ngày sinh nhật.

translation.en: I like to smell the flowers in the garden.

notes:
hoa = flower. It’s the general word for any kind of flower.

It’s a countable noun; common classifiers are bông and đóa (more poetic/romantic). For plural, use những / các + hoa.

Very common pairings: hoa hồng (rose), hoa mai, hoa sen, cắm hoa (arrange flowers), bó hoa (bouquet).

It can also mean a floral pattern on clothes (áo hoa) and appears in expressions like hoa mắt (dizzy, “see stars”).
notes_md:
**hoa** = flower. It’s the general word for any kind of flower.

It’s a countable noun; common classifiers are **bông** and **đóa** (more poetic/romantic). For plural, use **những / các** + hoa.

Very common pairings: **hoa hồng** (rose), **hoa mai**, **hoa sen**, **cắm hoa** (arrange flowers), **bó hoa** (bouquet).

It can also mean a floral pattern on clothes (**áo hoa**) and appears in expressions like **hoa mắt** (dizzy, “see stars”).

content.sentence: Cô ấy mua ___ để trang trí.

definitions.en: The part of a plant, often colorful and attractive, used for reproduction and decoration.
definitions.vi: Bộ phận của cây thường có màu sắc, hình dạng đẹp, dùng để sinh sản và trang trí.

example.vi: Bà tặng tôi một bó hoa rất đẹp.
example.en: Grandma gave me a very beautiful bouquet of flowers.

exampleSentencesTranslated: This morning I bought a bouquet of fresh flower to give to my mom.
I like to plant flower in the garden on weekends.
She received a lot of flower on her birthday.
